---
title: "Home"
---

```{r}
library(lubridate)
library(googlesheets4)
updated <- with_tz(Sys.time(), "Africa/Johannesburg")
```

**Last updated:** `r format(updated, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M %Z")`

This site presents annual statistics and summaries as a live, web-based document.

All tables are generated directly from the SEEC Google Sheets and update automatically whenever the site is rebuilt - still working on this.
